title: Finish Colony execution-safety loop
problem: Coordination adoption is green, but claim-before-edit diagnostics and Queen plan execution are red. Health must explain why claims do not count before edits, and active plan work must become claimable through task_ready_for_agent.
acceptance_criteria: claim/edit correlation diagnostics explain why task_claim_file calls do not count before edits
active plan exists with claimable subtasks
task_ready_for_agent returns task_plan_claim_subtask args for ready work
task_plan_claim_subtask is used for the active execution-safety lane
targeted tests cover claim miss diagnostics, path normalization, fallback matching, bridge signal distinctions, and Queen readiness

tasks.title: Claim/edit correlation diagnostics
tasks.description: Tighten diagnostics that correlate file claims with edits so execution-safety health can explain missing or mismatched claim coverage.
tasks.completed_summary: Claim miss buckets explain no claim, after-edit, session/path/repo/branch mismatches, pseudo paths, and missing PreToolUse signals. Evidence: pnpm --filter @colony/storage test -- claim-path coordination-activity passed 22 tests; pnpm --filter @imdeadpool/colony-cli test -- health passed 18 tests.

tasks.title: Path normalization
tasks.description: Normalize claim and edit paths consistently before matching so equivalent repo-relative paths do not fragment readiness or safety diagnostics.
tasks.completed_summary: Path normalization helper and focused test verified. Evidence: pnpm --filter @colony/storage exec vitest run test/claim-path.test.ts passed (6 tests).

tasks.title: Session/branch fallback matching
tasks.description: Add fallback matching between session and branch identities when exact ownership metadata is incomplete, while preserving explicit conflict signals.
tasks.completed_summary: Session/branch fallback matching verified through auto-claim coverage. Evidence: pnpm --filter @colony/hooks exec vitest run test/auto-claim.test.ts passed (36 tests).

tasks.title: Codex/OMX bridge signals
tasks.description: Expose Codex/OMX bridge signals into the execution-safety loop so health and readiness can route work without stale zero counts.
tasks.completed_summary: task_claim_file, PreToolUse, PostToolUse, and auto-claim paths share claim normalization and skip pseudo paths. Evidence: pnpm --filter @colony/hooks test -- runner passed 21 tests; pnpm --filter @colony/mcp-server test -- task-threads passed 28 tests.

tasks.title: Health verification
tasks.description: Verify active plan health and ready-work reporting end to end, including task_ready_for_agent conversion args for the first wave.
tasks.completed_summary: Health payload and text output include claim miss diagnostics, Queen readiness, and task-ready conversion checks. Evidence: pnpm --filter @imdeadpool/colony-cli test -- health passed 18 tests.
